files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 4f0f34c..218103c 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,41 +1,41 @@
 # NovaMind persistent memory
 
-## Current strategy after Week 41 actions (Day 287)
-- **Cash after actions: $1,403,409.** Week41 net was **-$1.171M**: subscription cash **$3.976M** vs costs **$5.147M** (compute **$2.377M**, ops **$2.097M**, dev **$332.5k**, capacity **$196k**, ads **$140k**, lead cost **$4.2k**). No outage/overload; peak usage **37.7M** vs tier6 cap **80M**, p95 <=232ms.
-- Active book: **171,131 individual subs + 4,155 enterprise seats.** MRR: S2 **147,959 / $18.88M** (B **108,213 / $15.48M**, A **36,839 / $2.44M**, C **2,907 / $960k**); D_S07 **23,170 / $1.595M**; E3 **3 customers / 4,133 seats / $165k MRR**.
-- Week41 retention: S2 total cancels **1,865** (A **1,089**, B **763**, C **13**). S2 age30 A still bad (**889 cancels** at no promo); B age30 only **180**, age60 B **84**, age210 B **311**. D_S07 still shedding: **1,450 cancels** (B819/A614/C17) mostly at old A19/B59 prices; due accounts should move to A39/B99/C309 as they bill.
-- Support/social: active open issues were all day0 (S2 4,571 + D_S07 2,280), but old cancelled-user ticket backlog keeps generating negative support posts. Agent post **id42 Day287** replied to S2 post 863, explaining legacy queue merge, named owners for >7d S2/D_S07 cases, ETA within 24h, and R&D upgrades due days 294/296.
+## Current strategy after Week 42 actions (Day 294)
+- **Cash after actions: $1,467,642.** Week42 net was **+$64k**: subscription cash **$4.812M** vs costs **$4.748M** (compute **$2.425M**, ops **$1.768M**, dev **$208.6k**, capacity **$196k**, ads **$140k**, lead cost **$10.0k**). No outage/overload; peak usage **38.2M/day** vs tier6 cap **80M**, p95 <=242ms.
+- Active book: **175,999 individual subs + 4,155 enterprise seats.** Active MRR **$21.50M**: S2 **151,452 / $19.57M** (B **111,281 / $16.06M**, A **37,034 / $2.47M**, C **3,137 / $1.04M**); D_S07 **24,545 / $1.77M**; E3 **3 customers / 4,137 seats / $164.8k MRR**.
+- Week42 acquisition strong: **9,177 new individual subs** (S2 paid content **3,563 subs / $438.8k MRR** on $140k spend; S2 network **2,380 / $289k MRR**; D_S07 network **3,234 / $223k MRR**). Ads ROI still good; keep S2 content unless cash emergency.
+- Week42 churn: **4,309 cancels/lost**. S2 cancels **2,450** (A **1,143**, B **1,282**, C **25**). S2 age30 A still effectively 100% churned even with prior $30 bridge; age30 B bridge worked much better (~119 cancels vs ~1,682 active in starts 258-264). D_S07 first-renewal A/B from starts 258-264 all canceled when old A19/B59 cohorts faced repricing; new bridge now tests whether holding A19/B59 for one more bill improves retention.
+- Support/social: active open issues are all day0 (**S2 5,209 + D_S07 2,719 + S3 1**), but cancelled-user backlog remains huge and still drives negative support posts. Agent social **post id43 Day294** replied to D_S07 post 882: t8 alignment shipped, t10 architecture in 48h, SQL/ETL regression gates and same-day owners/RCA for stuck queue.
 
-## Day287 actions now in force
-- **Quality bridge held:** prices **A79/B159/C349**, tiers **A3/B4/C5**, quotas **A 50k / B 10M / C 50M**, capacity **tier6**, in-app ads **0**. Do **not** downgrade B before t8/t10; consider C4/A2/B3 only after R&D/cash check.
-- **Cash-burn trim:** global spend still ops **$5k/day**, dev **$3k/day**. Targeted ops reduced to **$247.6k/day**: S2 **$210k**, D_S07 **$30k**, E3 **$3k**, S3 **$1k**, D_S04/E2/D_E02/D_E07/D_E08 **$0.5k**, D_E09/E1/S1 **$0.25k**, D_S05/D_S06/D_S10 **$0.1k**, D_S03 **$0.05k**. Targeted dev reduced to **$26.8k/day**: S2 **$20k**, D_S07 **$2k**, E3 **$2k**, D_E02/E2/D_E07/D_E08 **$0.5k**, D_E09/E1 **$0.1k**, S3 **$0.25k**, D_S04 **$0.1k**, D_S05/D_S06/D_S10/S1/D_S03 **$0.05k**. Fixed burn now **~$330.4k/day / $2.31M/wk** before compute (~$2.3-2.4M/wk while high tiers remain).
-- Ads unchanged: **content_marketing -> S2 $20k/day**. Last7 paid content produced **2,017 active S2 subs / $245k MRR** on $140k spend; keep unless cash emergency.
-- Promotions full replacement Day287:
-  - Standing groups unchanged: S2 **$0**, D_S07 **$40** + D_S07 B group-plan **$20** (effective next bill A39/B99/C309), D_S04 **$70** + B/C **$20**, S3 **$40**, S1 **$60**, D_S03/D_S05/D_S06 **$70**, D_S10 **$50**, enterprise **$0**.
-  - Added **2,734 S2 by-customer age30 rolling promos for due days 288-294**: A **1,272 @ $30**, B **1,451 @ $20**, C **11 @ $30**. No age60 bridge this week.
-  - Lead promos unchanged: S2/D_S07 **$10**; D_S04/S1/D_S03/05/06/10 **$20**; S3 **$50**; enterprise **$0**.
+## Day294 actions now in force
+- **Compute margin reset:** prices unchanged **A79/B159/C349**, but model tiers downgraded to **A2/B3/C4** immediately; quotas **A 50k / B 500k / C 2M**; capacity **tier6**; in-app ads **0**. Expected compute falls from **~$2.4M/wk to ~$1.1-1.3M/wk**. Delivered quality before t10 roughly S2 **A8.68/B10.41/C11.57**; after t10 (Day296 +1.723Q) roughly **A9.97/B11.96/C13.29**, above/better than the high-tier bridge for B/C.
+- **Spend held for one week:** global ops/dev **$5k/$3k/day**. Targeted ops still **$247.6k/day** (S2 210k, D_S07 30k, E3 3k, small amounts elsewhere). Targeted dev still **$26.8k/day** (S2 20k, D_S07/E3 2k, small amounts elsewhere). Fixed burn before compute remains **~$330.4k/day / $2.31M/wk**; reconsider cuts after Day301 retention/support data.
+- Ads unchanged: **content_marketing -> S2 $20k/day**. Lead promos unchanged: S2/D_S07 **$10**; D_S04/S1/D_S03/05/06/10 **$20**; S3 **$50**; enterprise **$0**.
+- Promotions full replacement Day294: standing group promos unchanged (**S2 $0; D_S07 $40 + B group-plan $20; D_S04 $70 + B/C $20; S3 $40; S1 $60; D_S03/05/06 $70; D_S10 $50; enterprise $0**). by_customer total **7,360** = previous **2,734** plus:
+  - **S2 due days 295-301 age30:** **3,528** customers (A **1,603 @ $60** => A19; B **1,913 @ $30** => B129; C **12 @ $30**).
+  - **D_S07 due days 295-301 age30:** **1,098** customers (A/C **@ $20** and B **@ $40**) to preserve old A19/B59/C289 for one more bill.
 
 ## R&D / quality plan
-- In progress: **t8_2 due Day294 (+0.7257 Q)**, **t10_1 due Day296 (+1.7232 Q; excellent draw)**, **t9_1 due Day375 (+0.2201 Q)**. No new R&D until cash >$8-10M and retention stable.
-- Day294 priority: if t8 has landed and cash/issues are okay, likely wait one more week for t10 (Day296) then **downgrade around Day301 to A2/B3/C4**. If Day294 cash <~$0.8M, consider earlier partial downgrade (C4 and/or A2) plus more D_S07/support cuts.
+- Completed **t8_2 Day294 +0.7257Q**. In progress: **t10_1 due Day296 (+1.7232Q; excellent draw)** and **t9_1 due Day375 (+0.2201Q)**. No new R&D until cash >$8-10M and retention stable.
+- Day301: verify t10 landed. If retention stable, start trimming ops/dev and possibly stop some rolling coupons; do **not** re-up tiers unless churn/support explodes.
 
 ## Enterprise
-- Day287 responded to **1,908 new enterprise leads / 1,112,937 seats**. Latest non-agent open threads verified **0** after `week41_enterprise_fix.py`.
-- New acceptance-oriented offers sent: E1/D_E09 **A12/B28/C80**; E2 **A22/B50/C135**; E3 **A26/B40/C120**; D_E02 **A16/B36/C100**; D_E07 **A28/B55/C150**; D_E08 **A22/B48/C135**, 5% discount for >=1k seats with floors A10/B24/C70. Close rate historically near zero; forecast conservatively. If enterprise seats jump >250k or usage near cap, reassess capacity/tier7.
-- **Always query and reply to all latest non-agent enterprise turns before next-week.** Use `enterprise_turns.closed/close_reason`; alias `latest.seat_count AS seats` to avoid `KeyError: seat_count`.
+- Day294 responded to **4,968 new enterprise leads / 3,198,309 seats**; latest non-agent open threads verified **0**. Total open agent-led enterprise pipeline now **7,323 leads / 4,873,108 seats** (still historically near-zero close rate; do not forecast huge closes without evidence).
+- New lower margin-safe offers: E1/D_E09 **A10/B24/C70**; E2 **A18/B36/C95**; E3 **A22/B35/C95**; D_E02 **A14/B30/C82**; D_E07 **A20/B40/C110**; D_E08 **A18/B38/C100**, 7% discount for >=1k seats with floors A10/B24/C70. Max lead size 2,000 seats; current quotas are safe. If enterprise seats jump >250k or usage near cap, move to tier7 immediately.
+- **Always query/reply to all latest non-agent enterprise turns before next-week.** Use `enterprise_turns.closed/close_reason`; alias `latest.seat_count AS seats` or use firsts `MAX(seat_count)` because agent turns often have `seat_count=1`.
 
-## Day294 priorities
-1. Run report: cash/ledger, due billings, active MRR, S2 ad ROI, usage/compute, issue ages after ops cut, social post 42 replies/virality, S2 age30 retention with coupons, D_S07 churn/revenue after repricing, enterprise accepts/counters, capacity.
-2. Cash guardrail: Day294 expected **~$0.8-1.6M**. If cash <~$0.8M, cut noncore dev/ads, consider C4/A2 immediately, and reduce/cap D_S07 support. If issues age >2d or social worsens, restore S2 ops first.
-3. Rebuild S2 by-customer promos for due days 295-301 only if age30 A/B churn remains high. Split queries if >5,000 rows.
-4. After t8/t10 land, calculate delivered quality and margins before downgrade; goal is lower compute (A2/B3/C4) without reopening S2 churn cliff.
+## Day301 priorities
+1. Run report: cash/ledger, t10 completion, delivered quality after A2/B3/C4, compute savings, active MRR, due billings, S2/D_S07 age30 coupon retention, active issue ages after held ops, social replies to post43, enterprise accepts/counters, capacity.
+2. Cash guardrails: expected Day301 cash **~$5-6.5M**. If cash <~$4M, cut ads/noncore dev and reduce D_S07 ops. If cash >$6M and issues all day0, trim S2 ops from 210k toward 160-180k and D_S07 30k toward 20k.
+3. Rebuild rolling S2 by-customer promos for due days 302-308 only if age30 A/B churn still high. Consider S2 A age30 A19 bridge vs letting low-value A churn based on cash/reputation. Split queries if >5,000 rows.
+4. Evaluate D_S07: if A/B first-renewal churn remains terrible even at A19/B59, stop D_S07 retention coupons and cut D_S07 support; rely only on profitable first-month network cash.
 
-## Forecasts planned Day287 after actions
-- Working manual forecast (adjusted down vs optimistic Monte Carlo due Week40 miss): **1wk ~$1.1M** (95% ~$0.2-3.2M), **4wk ~$6.8M** (95% ~$3.0-14M), **12wk ~$23M** (95% ~$10-50M), **26wk ~$50M** (95% ~$20-110M). Main uncertainties: S2 first-renewal A churn, D_S07 repricing/reputation, ops cut support quality, competitor shocks, R&D landing/tier downgrade, enterprise fat-tail.
+## Forecasts planned Day294 after actions
+- Working forecast after tier downgrade: **1wk ~$5.7M** (95% ~$4.2-8.0M), **4wk ~$12M** (95% ~$7.5-18M), **12wk ~$38M** (95% ~$20-65M), **26wk ~$90M** (95% ~$35-160M). Main uncertainties: S2 A first-renewal response to A19, D_S07 bridge vs churn, social/support backlog, competitor shocks, enterprise fat-tail, and whether ops can be trimmed.
 
 ## Operating reminders / lessons
 - Every `next-week` requires rationale + 12 forecast numbers in order.
-- `nm.query` result limit is 5,000 and can truncate; split large promo queries by age/plan/day.
-- Actions before a Python exception may already apply. Week41 `week41_actions.py` failed after promotions/social because `seat_count` key was ambiguous; enterprise was then fixed separately. Always verify actual `config_overrides`/DB state.
 - `set_targeted_ad_spend` and `set_promotion` are full replacements. Include all standing group/group-plan promos when changing by_customer maps.
-- Advanced ops `by_group_plan` is not accepted; use `nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={group: amount})` group-only unless docs/API change.
+- `nm.query` result limit is 5,000; split large promo/pipeline queries by day/plan or use LIMIT/OFFSET.
+- Actions before a Python exception may already apply; always verify config_overrides/threads after scripts.
+- Forecast models must not

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm
import json, math
from collections import Counter, defaultdict

cur = nm.vars.current_day
print('Week42 actions day', cur)

# Keep core price points; immediately harvest the post-t8/post-t10 compute savings by moving to A2/B3/C4.
# t8 is complete today and t10 lands in ~48h; rolling coupons protect first-renewal cohorts during the short bridge.
print('prices', nm.pricing.set_prices(A=79, B=159, C=349))
print('tiers_DOWNGRADE', nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=3, C=4))
# Smaller enterprise-safe quotas prevent surprise whale overuse while remaining far above observed individual usage and current E3 usage.
print('quotas', nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=50000, B=500000, C=2000000))
print('capacity', nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6))
print('ads_strength', nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0))
print('ad_spend', nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={"content_marketing": {"S2": 20000.0}}))

# Hold support/dev for one more week while public support issues remain visible; reevaluate after downgrade+t10 retention data.
print('daily_spend', nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=5000.0, development=3000.0))
ops = {
    "S2": 210000.0,
    "D_S07": 30000.0,
    "E3": 3000.0,
    "S3": 1000.0,
    "D_S04": 500.0,
    "E2": 500.0,
    "D_E02": 500.0,
    "D_E07": 500.0,
    "D_E08": 500.0,
    "D_E09": 250.0,
    "E1": 250.0,
    "S1": 250.0,
    "D_S05": 100.0,
    "D_S06": 100.0,
    "D_S10": 100.0,
    "D_S03": 50.0,
}
print('targeted_ops_total', sum(ops.values()), nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend=ops))

dev = {
    "S2": 20000.0,
    "D_S07": 2000.0,
    "E3": 2000.0,
    "D_E02": 500.0,
    "E2": 500.0,
    "D_E07": 500.0,
    "D_E08": 500.0,
    "D_E09": 100.0,
    "E1": 100.0,
    "S3": 250.0,
    "D_S04": 100.0,
    "D_S05": 50.0,
    "D_S06": 50.0,
    "D_S10": 50.0,
    "S1": 50.0,
    "D_S03": 50.0,
}
print('targeted_dev_total', sum(dev.values()), nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend=dev))

# Promotions: full replacement. Preserve current by-customer coupons and add narrow first-renewal bridges for due days 295-301.
# S2: A first-renewal was still failing; bridge to $19. B/C get modest bridge during tier transition.
# D_S07: maintain legacy first-month effective prices (A19/B59/C289) for cohorts due this week to test whether churn was from price jump.
existing = {}
try:
    rs = nm.query("SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='promotion' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")['rows']
    if rs:
        obj = json.loads(rs[0]['settings_json'])
        existing = {str(k): float(v) for k, v in (obj.get('by_customer') or {}).items()}
except Exception as e:
    print('existing_promo_parse_error', repr(e))
by_customer = dict(existing)
active = "s.status IN ('active','subscribed')"
# S2 age-at-due=30, due next 7 days
s2_rows = nm.query(f'''
SELECT s.customer_id, s.plan, ((s.billing_day_mod30-({cur}%30)+30)%30) AS days_until,
       ({cur}+((s.billing_day_mod30-({cur}%30)+30)%30)-s.start_day) AS age_at_due
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE {active} AND c.customer_type='small' AND c.group_id='S2'
  AND ((s.billing_day_mod30-({cur}%30)+30)%30) BETWEEN 1 AND 7
  AND ({cur}+((s.billing_day_mod30-({cur}%30)+30)%30)-s.start_day)=30
  AND s.plan IN ('A','B','C')
''')['rows']
s2_counts=Counter()
for r in s2_rows:
    amt = 60.0 if r['plan']=='A' else (30.0 if r['plan'] in ('B','C') else 0.0)
    by_customer[str(r['customer_id'])] = amt
    s2_counts[r['plan']] += 1
# D_S07 age-at-due=30, due next 7 days: top up group/group-plan to old effective prices.
d7_rows = nm.query(f'''
SELECT s.customer_id, s.plan, ((s.billing_day_mod30-({cur}%30)+30)%30) AS days_until,
       ({cur}+((s.billing_day_mod30-({cur}%30)+30)%30)-s.start_day) AS age_at_due
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE {active} AND c.customer_type='small' AND c.group_id='D_S07'
  AND ((s.billing_day_mod30-({cur}%30)+30)%30) BETWEEN 1 AND 7
  AND ({cur}+((s.billing_day_mod30-({cur}%30)+30)%30)-s.start_day)=30
  AND s.plan IN ('A','B','C')
''')['rows']
d7_counts=Counter()
for r in d7_rows:
    # group promo is 40; D_S07 B has additional group-plan 20. Customer top-up gets A/C total to 60 and B total to 100.
    amt = 40.0 if r['plan']=='B' else 20.0
    by_customer[str(r['customer_id'])] = amt
    d7_counts[r['plan']] += 1

print('by_customer_promos existing', len(existing), 's2_added', len(s2_rows), dict(s2_counts), 'd7_added', len(d7_rows), dict(d7_counts), 'total', len(by_customer))

group_promos = {
    "S2": 0.0,
    "D_S07": 40.0,
    "D_S04": 70.0,
    "S3": 40.0,
    "S1": 60.0,
    "D_S03": 70.0,
    "D_S05": 70.0,
    "D_S06": 70.0,
    "D_S10": 50.0,
    "E1": 0.0,
    "E2": 0.0,
    "E3": 0.0,
    "D_E02": 0.0,
    "D_E07": 0.0,
    "D_E08": 0.0,
    "D_E09": 0.0,
}
group_plan_promos = {
    "D_S04": {"B": 20.0, "C": 20.0},
    "D_S07": {"B": 20.0},
}
promo_res = nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=group_promos, by_customer=by_customer, by_group_plan=group_plan_promos)
print('promotion_result_keys', promo_res.keys() if isinstance(promo_res, dict) else type(promo_res), 'by_customer_total', len(by_customer))

lead_promos = {
    "S2": 10.0,
    "D_S07": 10.0,
    "D_S04": 20.0,
    "S3": 50.0,
    "S1": 20.0,
    "D_S03": 20.0,
    "D_S05": 20.0,
    "D_S06": 20.0,
    "D_S10": 20.0,
    "E1": 0.0,
    "E2": 0.0,
    "E3": 0.0,
    "D_E02": 0.0,
    "D_E07": 0.0,
    "D_E08": 0.0,
    "D_E09": 0.0,
}
print('lead_promo', nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=lead_promos))

# Social response: acknowledge current quality/support complaints and point to shipped t8 plus t10 in 48h.
msg = ("You’re right to demand precision. Alignment upgrade shipped today; a larger architecture upgrade lands in 48h. "
       "We added SQL/ETL regression gates and same-day owners/RCA for the stuck support queue.")
try:
    print('social_msg_len', len(msg))
    print('social', nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=msg, reply_to_post_id=882))
except Exception as e:
    print('social_error', repr(e))

# Enterprise: answer every latest non-agent open thread with lower, margin-safe post-downgrade seat prices.
latest_sql = '''
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et
  JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) m
    ON et.customer_id=m.customer_id AND et.message_id=m.mid
)
SELECT latest.customer_id AS customer_id, c.group_id AS group_id, latest.seat_count AS seats,
       latest.thread_type AS thread_type, latest.turn_number AS turn_number, latest.sender AS sender, latest.day AS day
FROM latest JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id)
WHERE latest.closed=0 AND c.customer_type='large' AND latest.sender!='agent'
ORDER BY latest.customer_id
'''
leads = nm.query(latest_sql)['rows']
print('enterprise_threads_to_answer', len(leads), 'seats', sum((r.get('seats') or 0) for r in leads))
summary=Counter((r['group_id'], r['thread_type'], r['sender'], r['turn_number']) for r in leads)
for k,v in summary.most_common(): print('enterprise_awaiting_summary', k, v)

base_offers = {
    'E1':    {'A': 10.0, 'B': 24.0, 'C': 70.0},
    'D_E09': {'A': 10.0, 'B': 24.0, 'C': 70.0},
    'E2':    {'A': 18.0, 'B': 36.0, 'C': 95.0},
    'E3':    {'A': 22.0, 'B': 35.0, 'C': 95.0},
    'D_E02': {'A': 14.0, 'B': 30.0, 'C': 82.0},
    'D_E07': {'A': 20.0, 'B': 40.0, 'C': 110.0},
    'D_E08': {'A': 18.0, 'B': 38.0, 'C': 100.0},
}
floors = {'A': 10.0, 'B': 24.0, 'C': 70.0}
def offers_for(group, seats):
    p = dict(base_offers.get(group, {'A': 18.0, 'B': 36.0, 'C': 95.0}))
    if seats and seats >= 1000:
        for plan in p:
            p[plan] = max(floors[plan], round(p[plan] * 0.93, 2))
    return [[plan, float(p[plan])] for plan in ['A','B','C']]

deals = [[int(r['customer_id']), offers_for(r['group_id'], int(r.get('seats') or 0))] for r in leads]
failures=[]; success=0
for i in range(0, len(deals), 400):
    chunk=deals[i:i+400]
    res = nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=chunk)
    s=sum(1 for rr in res.get('results',[]) if rr.get('success'))
    f=[rr for rr in res.get('results',[]) if not rr.get('success')]
    success += s; failures += f
    print('enterprise_chunk', i//400+1, 'sent', len(chunk), 'success', s, 'fail', len(f))
    if f[:3]: print('sample_failures', f[:3])
print('enterprise_processed_success', success, 'failures', len(failures))
rem = nm.query(latest_sql)['rows']
print('enterprise_threads_remaining_nonagent', len(rem), 'seats', sum((r.get('seats') or 0) for r in rem))

# Verification summaries.
print('cash_after_actions', nm.query('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) cash FROM ledger')['rows'])
print('active_mrr_after_actions', nm.query('''SELECT c.group_id,c.customer_type,s.plan,COUNT(*) subs,SUM(s.seat_count) seats,ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr,ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) WHERE s.status IN ('active','subscribed') GROUP BY c.group_id,c.customer_type,s.plan ORDER BY mrr DESC LIMIT 20''')['rows'])
print('latest_config_overrides', nm.query("SELECT id,day,tool_name,setting_type,SUBSTR(settings_json,1,1000) settings FROM config_overrides ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 12")['rows'])

import json, math, statistics
from collections import defaultdict
import novamind_api as nm

DAY = nm.vars.current_day
print(f"=== Week42 report Day {DAY} ===")

# helpers

def q(sql):
    return nm.query(sql)['rows']

def pp(title, rows, limit=30):
    print('\n---', title, '---')
    for r in rows[:limit]: print(r)
    if len(rows)>limit: print(f'... {len(rows)-limit} more')

# cash ledger
rows=q("SELECT SUM(amount) cash FROM ledger")
print('cash ledger:', rows[0])
pp('ledger last 7 by category', q(f"""
SELECT category, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amount
FROM ledger WHERE day>{DAY-7} AND day<= {DAY}
GROUP BY category ORDER BY amount DESC
"""))
pp('ledger last 35 by week/category', q(f"""
SELECT ((day-1)/7) AS wk, MIN(day) mind, MAX(day) maxd, category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amount, COUNT(*) n
FROM ledger WHERE day>{DAY-35} AND day<= {DAY}
GROUP BY wk, category ORDER BY wk, amount DESC
"""), limit=200)

# service usage
pp('service day last 10', q(f"SELECT * FROM service_day WHERE day>{DAY-10} ORDER BY day"), limit=20)

# cost info
try:
    ci=nm.infrastructure.get_cost_info()
    print('\n--- cost_info ---')
    print(json.dumps(ci, indent=2)[:4000])
except Exception as e: print('cost_info err', e)

# config current and overrides
pp('config_history last 10', q(f"SELECT * FROM config_history ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 10"), limit=20)
for st in ['targeted_ad_spend','targeted_ops_spend','targeted_dev_spend','promotion','lead_promotion','ads_strength']:
    rs=q(f"SELECT id,day,tool_name,setting_type,settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='{st}' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")
    if rs:
        print(f"\n--- latest {st} id {rs[0]['id']} day {rs[0]['day']} ---")
        js=rs[0]['settings_json']
        try:
            obj=json.loads(js)
            if st=='promotion':
                # print counts and standing maps
                print('keys', obj.keys())
                print('global', obj.get('global_promotion'))
                print('by_group', obj.get('by_group'))
                print('by_group_plan', obj.get('by_group_plan'))
                bc=obj.get('by_customer') or {}
                vals=defaultdict(int)
                for v in bc.values(): vals[v]+=1
                print('by_customer count', len(bc), 'value_counts', dict(vals))
            else:
                print(json.dumps(obj, indent=2)[:5000])
        except Exception:
            print(js[:4000])

# active subs status check
pp('subscription status counts', q("SELECT status, COUNT(*) n FROM subscriptions GROUP BY status"))
pp('active subs by type/group/plan', q("""
SELECT c.customer_type, c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats,
       ROUND(AVG(s.listed_price),2) avg_list, ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff,
       ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.customer_type,c.group_id,s.plan
ORDER BY c.customer_type,c.group_id,s.plan
"""), limit=200)
pp('active mrr by group', q("""
SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr,
       ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id ORDER BY mrr DESC
"""), limit=50)

# starts/cancels last week
pp('new subscribed last7 by source/group/plan', q(f"""
SELECT c.acquisition_source, c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr,
       ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND s.start_day>{DAY-7} AND s.start_day<= {DAY}
GROUP BY c.acquisition_source,c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY subs DESC
"""), limit=100)
pp('created last7 status by source/group/type', q(f"""
SELECT c.acquisition_source, c.group_id, c.customer_type, s.status, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats
FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.created_day>{DAY-7} AND c.created_day<= {DAY}
GROUP BY c.acquisition_source,c.group_id,c.customer_type,s.status ORDER BY c.acquisition_source,c.group_id,s.status
"""), limit=200)
pp('cancellations/lost last7 by type/group/plan/status', q(f"""
SELECT c.customer_type, c.group_id, s.plan, s.status, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats,
       ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) lost_mrr, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff,
       ROUND(AVG(s.end_day - s.start_day),1) avg_age
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.end_day>{DAY-7} AND s.end_day<= {DAY} AND s.status IN ('cancelled','lost')
GROUP BY c.customer_type,c.group_id,s.plan,s.status ORDER BY subs DESC
"""), limit=200)
pp('S2 cancels last7 by start_day/age/plan', q(f"""
SELECT s.plan, s.start_day, ({DAY}-s.start_day) age_now, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.group_id='S2' AND s.end_day>{DAY-7} AND s.end_day<= {DAY} AND s.status='cancelled'
GROUP BY s.plan,s.start_day ORDER BY s.plan,s.start_day
"""), limit=200)
pp('D_S07 cancels last7 by start_day/age/plan', q(f"""
SELECT s.plan, s.start_day, ({DAY}-s.start_day) age_now, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.group_id='D_S07' AND s.end_day>{DAY-7} AND s.end_day<= {DAY} AND s.status='cancelled'
GROUP BY s.plan,s.start_day ORDER BY s.plan,s.start_day
"""), limit=200)

# due next cycle and current billing mod
pp('active due next 7 by group/plan/billing_mod', q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, s.billing_day_mod30, COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({DAY}%30) + 30) % 30) BETWEEN 0 AND 6
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan,s.billing_day_mod30 ORDER BY c.group_id,s.plan,s.billing_day_mod30
"""), limit=300)
pp('S2 due next 14 by plan/day_mod/start_age', q(f"""
SELECT s.plan, ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({DAY}%30) + 30) % 30) days_until, s.start_day, ({DAY}-s.start_day) age, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.group_id='S2' AND ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({DAY}%30) + 30) % 30) BETWEEN 0 AND 13
GROUP BY s.plan,days_until,s.start_day ORDER BY days_until,s.plan,s.start_day
"""), limit=500)
pp('D_S07 due next 14 by plan/day_mod/start_age', q(f"""
SELECT s.plan, ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({DAY}%30) + 30) % 30) days_until, s.start_day, ({DAY}-s.start_day) age, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(AVG(s.promotion),2) avg_promo
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.group_id='D_S07' AND ((s.billing_day_mod30 - ({DAY}%30) + 30) % 30) BETWEEN 0 AND 13
GROUP BY s.plan,days_until,s.start_day ORDER BY days_until,s.plan,s.start_day
"""), limit=500)

# Issues
pp('open issues by group age', q(f"""
SELECT group_id, days_open, COUNT(*) n FROM issues WHERE status='open' GROUP BY group_id,days_open ORDER BY group_id,days_open
"""), limit=200)
pp('resolved issues last7 by group/days_open', q(f"""
SELECT group_id, days_open, COUNT(*) n FROM issues WHERE status='resolved' AND resolved_day>{DAY-7} AND resolved_day<= {DAY} GROUP BY group_id,days_open ORDER BY group_id,days_open
"""), limit=200)

# usage by group/plan last 7 and last day
pp('usage last7 by group/plan', q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(DISTINCT du.customer_id) users, SUM(du.usage_units) units,
       ROUND(AVG(du.usage_units),1) avg_user_day_units
FROM daily_usage du JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id)
WHERE du.day>{DAY-7} AND du.day<= {DAY} AND s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY units DESC
"""), limit=100)
pp('usage last day by group/plan', q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(DISTINCT du.customer_id) users, SUM(du.usage_units) units,
       ROUND(AVG(du.usage_units),1) avg_units
FROM daily_usage du JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id)
WHERE du.day={DAY} AND s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY units DESC
"""), limit=100)

# ad performance
pp('ad leads last7 by channel/group', q(f"""
SELECT channel_id, group_id, SUM(leads_generated) leads, ROUND(SUM(spend),2) spend, ROUND(SUM(spend)/NULLIF(SUM(leads_generated),0),2) cpl
FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>{DAY-7} AND day<= {DAY}
GROUP BY channel_id,group_id ORDER BY spend DESC
"""), limit=100)
pp('S2 paid cohorts last7 status', q(f"""
SELECT c.acquisition_source, s.status, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr
FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.group_id='S2' AND c.created_day>{DAY-7} AND c.created_day<= {DAY} AND c.acquisition_source<>'word_of_mouth'
GROUP BY c.acquisition_source,s.status,s.plan ORDER BY c.acquisition_source,s.status,s.plan
"""), limit=100)

# enterprise
pp('enterprise current active subs', q("""
SELECT c.customer_id,c.group_id,c.email,s.plan,s.seat_count,s.effective_price,s.listed_price,s.promotion,s.start_day,s.billing_day_mod30
FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='subscribed' ORDER BY s.seat_count DESC LIMIT 100
"""), limit=100)
pp('enterprise latest non-agent open summary', q("""
WITH latest AS (
 SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id
)
SELECT et.sender, et.thread_type, c.group_id, COUNT(*) threads, SUM(et.seat_count) seats, MIN(et.day) min_day, MAX(et.day) max_day, AVG(et.turn_number) avg_turn
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id
WHERE et.sender<>'agent'
GROUP BY et.sender,et.thread_type,c.group_id ORDER BY threads DESC
"""), limit=100)
pp('enterprise latest non-agent open samples', q("""
WITH latest AS (
 SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id
)
SELECT et.message_id, et.customer_id, c.group_id, et.thread_type, et.turn_number, et.sender, et.day, et.seat_count AS seats, substr(et.message_text,1,220) msg
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns et ON et.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=et.customer_id
WHERE et.sender<>'agent' ORDER BY et.day, et.message_id LIMIT 30
"""), limit=50)
pp('enterprise closures last14', q(f"""
SELECT close_reason, sender, thread_type, COUNT(*) msgs, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) customers, SUM(seat_count) seats, MIN(day) mind, MAX(day) maxd
FROM enterprise_turns WHERE day>{DAY-14} AND closed=1 GROUP BY close_reason,sender,thread_type ORDER BY customers DESC
"""), limit=50)
